steps.title: Isolate the square term
steps.content: Start with $$2x^2-4=x^2$$ Subtract $x^2$ from both sides: $$x^2-4=0$$ so $$x^2=4$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Among the choices, $2$ is a solution. B is correct.

steps.title: Use the answer choices
steps.content: The equation has two mathematical solutions, $-2$ and $2$, but only positive $2$ appears in the choices. Substituting $2$ gives $2(4)-4=4$, which equals $2^2$.
